name: Oats

pros.title: contains useful beta-glucans
pros.explanation: Adds extra cardiovascular and satiety context beyond the base nutrient display.

pros.title: easy to build meals around
pros.explanation: Works well as a simple staple in many eating patterns.

pros.title: can support digestive regularity
pros.explanation: The overall fibre profile can be practically useful beyond the raw grams display.

cons.title: contains some anti-nutrients
cons.explanation: Phytates may slightly reduce mineral uptake.

cons.title: healthiness depends on what you add to it
cons.explanation: Sugary toppings can shift the outcome a lot.

cons.title: not ideal for everyone digestively
cons.explanation: Some people do not tolerate oats especially well.
